items.headline: Rumfield reunites with coach who taught him the lessons that have made him a ROY candidate

news_items.headline: Caminero bringing sweet swing back to HR Derby
news_items.summary: Junior Caminero is bringing his sweet swing back to the All-Star Home Run Derby.

news_items.headline: Reds put OF Myers on IL, activate reliever Pagan
news_items.summary: Reds outfielder Dane Myers was placed on the 10-day injured list with a bruised left shoulder on Tuesday, one day after crashing into an outfield wall.

news_items.headline: MLB, MLBPA donate $1M for Venezuela quake aid
news_items.summary: Major League Baseball and the MLB Players' Association announced a joint $1 million donation Tuesday to aid in recovery from the devastating earthquakes that struck Venezuela last week.

news_items.headline: MLB strikes out in 'Play Ball' trademark quest
news_items.summary: The U.S. Patent and Trademark Office has denied MLB's request to trademark the phrase "Play Ball," saying that the phrase is too commonplace.

news_items.headline: Bat flip unveils Contreras' concern for Venezuela
news_items.summary: Mindful of the people back home in his native Venezuela as they deal with the fallout from two massive earthquakes, Boston Red Sox first baseman Willson Contreras homered, flipped his bat and was later ejected from a 6-3 win over the Washington Nationals.

news_items.headline: Bregman regrets not running hard to 1B vs. Brewers...
news_items.summary: Third baseman Alex Bregman, 32, who signed a five-year, $175 million deal with the Cubs over the winter but has struggled in his first season, said Monday he regrets not running hard to first base in Chicago's victory over the Milwaukee Brewers on Sunday.

news_items.headline: Astros' Pena heading back to IL with calf strain
news_items.summary: Astros shortstop Jeremy Pena is returning to the injured list, this time with a mild left calf strain.

news_items.headline: The Red Sox are going for their sixth straight win against the Washington Nationals tonight
news_items.summary: On the mound to try and help them get there will be Connelly Early.

news_items.headline: Game Thread: White Sox (44-39) at Orioles (39-47)
news_items.summary: Erick Fedde and the South Siders look to get their first road series win since early May

news_items.headline: Mets at Blue Jays: Lineups, broadcast info, and open thread, 6/30/26
news_items.summary: The Mets try to even the series with the Jays.

news_items.headline: Tuesday night Orioles game thread: vs. White Sox, 6:35pm ET
news_items.summary: Trey Gibson and the O’s look to avoid a four-game losing streak by beating the Southsiders.

news_items.headline: Guerrero scratched from lineup with back tightness
Chicago Cubs vs. San Diego Padres preview, Tuesday 6/30, 7:05 CT
news_items.summary: The Cubs go for the series win.

news_items.headline: Ben Rice, Aaron Judge trail in MLB All-Star voting
news_items.summary: Aaron Judge is the only Yankee currently in position to be named an All-Star starter.

news_items.headline: Clay Holmes to throw bullpen session this week, Mets encouraged by RHP's progress
news_items.summary: Mets interim manager Andy Green delivered an encouraging update for Clay Holmes, who suffered a fractured fibula back in May.

news_items.headline: Gamethread 6/30: Pirates at Phillies
news_items.summary: Let’s send June out with a win
